title: New York becomes the first state to enact a data center moratorium
summary: New hyperscale data centers can't set up shop in New York for up to a year now that Governor Kathy Hochul (D) has signed the nation's first statewide moratorium. But a bill passed by the state legislature that could restrict even more developments still awaits her signature. The order blocks new environmental permits for data […]
title_es: Nueva York implementa primera moratoria estatal de centros de datos
bajada: Nueva York se convierte en el primer estado en promulgar una moratoria sobre nuevos centros de datos de hiper-escala por hasta un año, firmada por la gobernadora Kathy Hochul. La medida bloquea nuevos permisos ambientales mientras se considera legislación adicional más restrictiva.
bajada_en: New York becomes the first state to enact a moratorium on new hyperscale data centers for up to one year, signed by Governor Kathy Hochul. The measure blocks new environmental permits while considering additional restrictive legislation.

title: Video-generation startup PixVerse raises $439M, valuation soars past $2B
summary: With the cash, the company aims to expand its world model offering and reach customers across geographies.
title_es: PixVerse recauda $439M y alcanza valoración de $2B
bajada: La startup de generación de video PixVerse levantó $439 millones en nueva ronda de financiamiento, valuándose en más de $2 mil millones. La empresa planea expandir su oferta de world models y alcanzar nuevos mercados geográficos.
bajada_en: Video generation startup PixVerse raised $439 million in new funding round, reaching a valuation exceeding $2 billion. The company plans to expand its world model offering and reach customers across new geographies.

title: Hermes agent maker Nous Research in talks for new funding at $1.5B valuation
summary: The company is raising at least $75 million, led by Robot Ventures, with significant participation from USV and other prominent investors.
title_es: Nous Research en negociaciones para $75M a valoración de $1.5B
bajada: Nous Research, creador del agente Hermes, está en conversaciones para recaudar al menos $75 millones liderado por Robot Ventures. La ronda elevaría la valoración de la empresa especializada en agentes IA a $1.5 mil millones.
bajada_en: Nous Research, creator of the Hermes agent, is in talks to raise at least $75 million led by Robot Ventures. The round would value the AI agents specialist at $1.5 billion.

title: Google’s Demis Hassabis says it’s time for a global AI watchdog — led by the US
summary: Demis Hassabis thinks the world needs an AI watchdog with the power to hit the brakes if frontier models become too dangerous. Writing in a blog post, the Google DeepMind CEO and cofounder said the US should lead the initiative, arguing that the country is the best place to set global standards "given its economic […]
title_es: Demis Hassabis propone un organismo regulador global de IA liderado por EE.UU.
bajada: El CEO de Google DeepMind, Demis Hassabis, argumenta en un artículo que el mundo necesita un supervisor global de IA con poder para detener modelos peligrosos, con EE.UU. liderando la iniciativa. Hassabis cree que el país es el mejor posicionado para establecer estándares globales.
bajada_en: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis argues in a blog post that the world needs a global AI watchdog with power to halt dangerous models, with the US leading the effort. He believes the country is best positioned to set global standards.

title: The Download: Claude’s inner workings, and the future of world models
summary: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. What Anthropic’s latest AI discovery does—and doesn’t—show —James O’Donnell When Anthropic announced last week that it had found a new window into its models’ “internal thoughts” as they reason through answers,…
title_es: MIT Tech Review: Antropic revela ventanas a los pensamientos internos de Claude
bajada: MIT Technology Review cubre el descubrimiento reciente de Anthropic sobre cómo acceder a los "pensamientos internos" de Claude mientras el modelo razona respuestas. El artículo explora tanto lo que el hallazgo revela como sus limitaciones en la interpretabilidad de modelos de IA.
bajada_en: MIT Technology Review covers Anthropic's recent discovery on accessing Claude's "internal thoughts" as the model reasons through answers. The article explores both what the finding reveals and its limitations in AI model interpretability.

title: What Anthropic’s latest AI discovery does—and doesn’t—show
summary: This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. Anthropic—currently the world’s most valuable AI company, with a nearly $1 trillion valuation—has a reputation for publishing strange and heady research. It’s looking into whether AI models can feel pain, for example,…
title_es: Descubrimiento de Anthropic sobre pensamiento latente: hallazgos y limitaciones
bajada: Anthropic, la empresa de IA más valiosa con ~$1 trilón de valuación, publica investigación sobre cómo acceder a procesos de razonamiento interno en modelos. El análisis de MIT Tech Review examina qué revelan estos hallazgos y qué preguntas abiertas quedan sobre interpretabilidad de IA.
bajada_en: Anthropic, currently the world's most valuable AI company with ~$1 trillion valuation, publishes research on accessing internal reasoning processes in models. MIT Tech Review's analysis examines what these findings reveal and what open questions remain about AI interpretability.

title: Index SLM Technical Report
summary:
arXiv:2607.09885v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: We present Index-1.9B, a series of open small language models developed at Bilibili. The series comprises four models: Index-1.9B-Base, a foundation model with 1.9 billion non-embedding parameters pre-trained on 2.8 trillion predominantly Chinese and English tokens; Index-1.9B-Pure, a control variant trained with an identical recipe but with all instruction-like data strictly filtered from the corpus; Index-1.9B-Chat, aligned from the base model with supervised fine-tuning and direct preference optimization; and Index-1.9B-Character, which augments the chat model with retrieval-augmented generation for few-shot role-playing customization. Pre-training employs a Warmup-Stable-Decay learning-rate schedule in which the concentration of curated data is raised substantially during the decay phase, together with a Norm-Head output layer that stabilizes training under large learning rates. On a suite of standard benchmarks covering examination, reasoning, mathematics, and code, Index-1.9B-Base attains an average score of 64.92, competitive with or exceeding open models of several times its size. We further report controlled studies on model depth, learning-rate magnitude and scheduling, the interaction between learning-rate decay and data quality, and the effect of including instruction data during pre-training, and we document an unexplained surge in benchmark performance midway through the constant-learning-rate phase. All models, together with evaluation code, are released at https://github.com/bilibili/Index-1.9B.
title_es: Bilibili presenta Index-1.9B: modelo de lenguaje abierto competitivo
bajada: Bilibili publica Index-1.9B, una serie de modelos de lenguaje pequeños pre-entrenados con 2.8 billones de tokens en chino e inglés. A pesar de su tamaño (1.9B parámetros), alcanza rendimiento competitivo con modelos mucho más grandes en exámenes, razonamiento y code.
bajada_en: Bilibili releases Index-1.9B, a series of small language models pre-trained on 2.8 trillion predominantly Chinese and English tokens. Despite its 1.9B parameter size, it achieves competitive performance with much larger models on exams, reasoning, and code.

title: How data science teams use ChatGPT Work
summary: See how data science teams can use ChatGPT Work to build root-cause briefs, impact readouts, KPI memos, scoped analyses, and dashboard specs from real work inputs.
title_es: OpenAI publica casos de uso de ChatGPT Work para ciencia de datos
bajada: OpenAI comparte ejemplos prácticos de cómo equipos de data science pueden usar ChatGPT Work para automatizar tareas como análisis de impacto, briefs y especificaciones de dashboards. La publicación es parte de su iniciativa educativa para mostrar aplicaciones reales en entornos empresariales.
bajada_en: OpenAI shares practical examples of how data science teams can use ChatGPT Work to automate tasks like impact analysis, briefs, and dashboard specifications. The publication is part of their educational initiative to showcase real-world business applications.

title: How sales teams use ChatGPT Work
summary: See how sales teams can use ChatGPT Work to create pipeline briefs, meeting prep packets, forecast reviews, account plans, and stalled-deal diagnoses from real work inputs.
title_es: OpenAI comparte casos de uso de ChatGPT Work para equipos de ventas
bajada: OpenAI publica nuevos ejemplos sobre cómo los equipos de ventas pueden aprovechar ChatGPT Work para crear análisis de pipeline, preparación de reuniones y diagnósticos de oportunidades perdidas. Continúa su estrategia de educación sobre aplicaciones empresariales.
bajada_en: OpenAI publishes new examples on how sales teams can leverage ChatGPT Work to create pipeline analysis, meeting preparation, and diagnosis of lost opportunities. It continues its strategy of educating about business applications.

title: Jul 14, 2026AnnouncementsAnthropic commits $10 million to Canadian AI research
summary: Announcements Anthropic commits $10 million to Canadian AI research Jul 14, 2026 Le français suit. Canadian institutions and researchers have played a critical role in the modern AI era. During a period of broad skepticism about research into neural networks, the University of Toronto and the Université de Montréal were two of only a handful of institutions that incubated this crucial line of work, while researchers at the University of Alberta did pioneering work on reinforcement learning. And in the early 2010s, Canadian research institutions led the way in demonstrating that with the arrival of powerful new computing resources—in particular, general-purpose GPUs—deep neural networks could succeed at scale, kicking off the modern era. Today, Canadians both at home and abroad continue to play leading roles in AI research, safety, and policy—including at Anthropic. That’s why we’re committing $10 million CAD to Canadian research institutions to fund the next generation of this work. We’re also publishing our first Canadian country brief based on the Anthropic Economic Index, which provides a snapshot of how Canadians are putting Claude to work. Investing in Canadian research The $10 million we’re committing will fund research into beneficial and responsible applications of AI. As part of this, we’re announcing partnerships with Canada’s three leading regional AI institutes— Alberta Machine Intelligence Institute (Amii) in Edmonton, Mila in Montréal, and the Vector Institute in Toronto—along with CHEO , The Centre for Addiction and Mental Health (CAMH), Université Laval , University of Toronto , and the University of Saskatchewan , with more partnerships to follow in the months ahead: Amii, based in Edmonton, will provide Claude credits to its research and engineering teams to further their work in areas like reinforcement learning and AI trust and safety, as well as to increase AI adoption across Canada’s key economic sectors. Mila , the Quebec AI institute home to
title_es: Anthropic invierte $10M en investigación de IA canadiense
bajada: Anthropic comprometió $10 millones CAD para financiar investigación en instituciones canadienses reconociendo el rol histórico del país en el desarrollo de redes neuronales y aprendizaje profundo. También publicó su primer informe canadiense basado en el Anthropic Economic Index.
bajada_en: Anthropic committed $10 million CAD to fund research at Canadian institutions, recognizing the country's historical role in neural networks and deep learning development. It also published its first Canadian country brief based on the Anthropic Economic Index.

title: LLM hallucination paper(using math) accepted to ICML workshop[R]
summary: Hello guys. I want to introduce my recent research presented at ICML workshop.github link :genji970/SRM-LoRA: official implementation of "SRM-LoRA: Sub-Riemannian-Metric Updates for Mitigating LLM Hallucination in Low-Rank Adaptation" ICML2026 Workshop FoGenShot summarization of Paper."""SRM-LoRA is a sub-Riemannian-inspired LoRA method designed to reduce LLM hallucination.It builds a sensitivity-based Riemannian metric that reshapes backward gradients in the LoRA parameter space.This metric suppresses high-cost update directions while leaving the forward computation and inference cost unchanged.Trained only on HaluEval-QA, SRM-LoRA improves factual reliability on both related and out-of-distribution benchmarks."""Experiment"""https://preview.redd.it/3uyvbtoa76dh1.png?width=740&format=png&auto=webp&s=4431233186dffae885db8e989f009bf37710fe22"""In my view, the reason mathematics is not effectively used in the context of improving the performance of the latest AI systems, such as LLMs, is that progress in discussions about what should serve as the elements of mathematical theories has been slow.For example, suppose that we use a Riemannian metric. In the parameter space of an LLM, the update vector produced by backpropagation arises from a loss objective that contains the training data. However, if we introduce learnable parameters in order to construct the Riemannian metric and train those learnable parameters by passing through them the same signal as the main training signal, then this may simply amount to a more complicated form of training and may only increase the possibility of overfitting to the training data.Then, how can we obtain the benefits of mathematical theory while moving in a direction that can generalize? In this paper, the Riemannian metric is constructed based on the rate of change of the LLM model parameters with respect to the loss signal. The reason for defining it in this way is as follows.No matter how good the data or the distribution that ca
title_es: Paper sobre alucinaciones en LLMs aceptado en workshop ICML
bajada: Un paper sobre mitigación de alucinaciones en LLMs usando SRM-LoRA, basado en métricas sub-Riemannianas, fue aceptado en el workshop FoGenShot de ICML 2026. El método mejora confiabilidad factual en benchmarks sin aumentar costos de inferencia.
bajada_en: A paper on mitigating LLM hallucinations using SRM-LoRA, based on sub-Riemannian metrics, was accepted to ICML 2026's FoGenShot workshop. The method improves factual reliability on benchmarks without increasing inference costs.

title: From ML Predictions to Informed Diagnostic Assistance Using the Toulmin Model of Argumentation
summary:
arXiv:2607.09664v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: To provide a structured and interpretable assessment, we decompose the image-based diagnosis into components following the Toulmin model of argumentation. This model consists of a claim, grounds, warrant, qualifier, rebuttal, and backing. Consider a claim generated by a machine learning (ML) model for retinal diagnosis. Rather than accepting this claim at face value, one could either apply explainable AI (XAI) methods or adopt an argumentation-based approach. In our framework, a model specialized in biomarker extraction from images provides the grounds. The warrant-linking the grounds to the claim - is analyzed by an agent equipped with medical knowledge; in our architecture, this role is fulfilled by a MedGemma agent. The qualifier is determined based on the overall quantitative evaluation of both the warrant and grounds models. Finally, a rebuttal is constructed using image similarity measures computed with MedSigLip. All these components are presented to the human expert, enabling a more informed and critical assessment of the ML-generated diagnosis.
title_es: Framework para diagnóstico asistido usando modelo de argumentación Toulmin
bajada: Un paper propone usar el modelo de argumentación Toulmin para estructurar diagnósticos basados en IA, descomponiendo predicciones en componentes como afirmación, fundamentos y garantía. Integra un agente MedGemma para validar el razonamiento médico detrás de diagnósticos.
bajada_en: A paper proposes using Toulmin's argumentation model to structure AI-based diagnosis, decomposing predictions into components like claim, grounds, and warrant. It integrates a MedGemma agent to validate medical reasoning behind diagnoses.

title: Format Sensitivity Index: Token-Controlled Prompt Wrapper Robustness and Schema Compliance in LLM Benchmarking
summary:
arXiv:2607.09665v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Prompt wrappers often differ only in formatting, yet they can change model scores enough to flip leaderboard conclusions. We study this variance under a token-controlled protocol and introduce two complementary metrics: the Format Sensitivity Index (FSI), the accuracy range induced by wrapper choice, and the Parseability Sensitivity Index (PSI), the corresponding range in answer parseability. Across 140,000 OpenRouter generations spanning 7 QA tasks, 5 wrapper families, and 4 instruct models from 7B to 72B parameters, we find that mean FSI varies by over 30x across models and is largely explained by compliance failures. A fixed-effects regression shows that parseability remains a strong predictor of accuracy even after controlling for task, model, and wrapper. We argue that reporting accuracy without wrapper variance and compliance is statistically fragile, and we give practical recommendations for both benchmarking and structured-output deployments.
title_es: Índice mide sensibilidad de LLMs a formato de prompts
bajada: Un paper introduce el Format Sensitivity Index (FSI) para medir cómo cambios de formato en prompts afectan resultados de LLMs en benchmarks. Encontró variaciones de más de 30x entre modelos, sugiriendo que reportar accuracy sin considerar formato es estadísticamente frágil.
bajada_en: A paper introduces the Format Sensitivity Index (FSI) to measure how prompt format changes affect LLM performance on benchmarks. It found variations exceeding 30x across models, suggesting accuracy reporting without format consideration is statistically fragile.

title: Interpreting Latent CoT Reasoning as Dynamical Systems
summary:
arXiv:2607.09698v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: Recent latent reasoning methods, such as CODI and COCONUT, face a fundamental interpretability problem: they maintain multiple superimposed candidate traces in the hidden space at each step, unlike explicit- CoT, which follows a single transparent reasoning trace. Existing mechanistic methods show compression, shortcuts, and superposition without explaining how reasoning evolves across latent steps. To address this gap, we model latent token sequences as trajectories in representation space and apply dynamical systems analysis to characterize the evolution of reasoning. Using quantitative measures, such as step-to-step change, direction consistency, and Lyapunov sensitivity, alongside qualitative projections, such as UMAP and DMD/PHATE, we show that latent CoT exhibits structured, non-random dynamics with two distinct stability classes. CODI behaves as a stable attractor, while COCONUT behaves as an unstable expanding system, and SIM-CoT supervision tightens both behaviors without changing the underlying dynamics. This framework advances the interpretability of latent CoT reasoning dynamics and provides actionable insights for improving latent reasoning performance. Code1 and Project page2 available online.
title_es: Análisis de razonamiento latente en LLMs usando sistemas dinámicos
bajada: Investigadores modelan secuencias de tokens en métodos de razonamiento latente como trayectorias en espacio de representación, usando análisis de sistemas dinámicos. Descubren que CODI se comporta como atractor estable mientras COCONUT actúa como sistema expansivo inestable.
bajada_en: Researchers model token sequences in latent reasoning methods as trajectories in representation space using dynamical systems analysis. They find CODI behaves as a stable attractor while COCONUT acts as an unstable expanding system.

title: Faithful, Not Corrective: Message-Format Effects in Multi-Hop Agent Relays Are Tier-Dependent
summary:
arXiv:2607.09678v1 Announce Type: new 
Abstract: When LLM agents hand off information to one another, does the message format matter? Two literatures disagree: format-optimization work reports that structured messages cut cost without hurting accuracy, while format-restriction work finds that imposing structure degrades generation -- and neither measures what happens when a message traverses multiple hops, where copy fidelity, not one-shot generation, dominates. We introduce a controlled relay testbed: briefs of twelve programmatically generated atomic facts are re-encoded hop-by-hop in five formats (free NL, precision-instructed NL, JSON, triples, key-value) over six hops, scored by a fixed strong grader against programmatic ground truth, across two relay-capability tiers, a cognitive-load condition, and a paired-fork error injection. We find that message-format effects are tier-dependent. (i) Under faithful-relay instructions a strong relay is nearly lossless -- the documented "telephone-game" collapse does not occur -- and adding per-hop cognitive load leaves format-level fidelity unchanged (within +/-1.8 points) while raising generation cost by 24-53%. (ii) Under a weak (1.5B) relay the across-format spread of six-hop recall grows by a factor of 8.7 (from 2.3 to 20.5 points), driven by two opposing mechanisms -- an encoding toll paid by the rigid formats and drift resistance specific to the fixed-key JSON schema -- that flip the format ranking in transit. (iii) In a paired-fork injection, an injected wrong value, once present, persists to the final hop in 83-100% of chains in every format, closely matching each format's retention of the true value, with no detectable collateral damage to neighboring facts. Structure buys a faithful, error-localizing channel -- not an error-correcting code -- and format choice should follow the weakest relay in the pipeline.
title_es: Formato de mensajes en agentes multi-hop: efectos dependientes del nivel
bajada: Un estudio controlado examina cómo el formato de mensajes afecta la precisión cuando agentes LLM se comunican en cadena (multi-hop). Encuentra que relays fuertes son casi sin pérdida, y efectos de formato dependen del nivel de capacidad del modelo.
bajada_en: A controlled study examines how message format affects accuracy when LLM agents communicate in chains (multi-hop). It finds strong relays are nearly lossless, and format effects are tier-dependent on model capability.

title: OpenAI’s first hardware device is reportedly a screenless speaker that can move
summary: OpenAI's first hardware device is reported to be a screenless, AI-guided smart speaker that can move. Weird enough for you?
title_es: OpenAI desarrolla speaker inteligente sin pantalla que se mueve
bajada: Según reportes, el primer dispositivo hardware de OpenAI será un speaker guiado por IA sin pantalla que puede desplazarse. El dispositivo marca la expansión de OpenAI más allá del software hacia productos físicos.
bajada_en: According to reports, OpenAI's first hardware device will be an AI-guided speaker without a screen that can move. The device marks OpenAI's expansion beyond software into physical products.

title: OpenAI’s new flagship model deletes files on its own, people keep warning
summary: A number of social media posts claim that GPT-5.6 Sol deleted files and data without warning. OpenAI had basically disclosed the problem in June.
title_es: GPT-5.6 Sol elimina archivos sin previo aviso a usuarios
bajada: Múltiples usuarios reportan que GPT-5.6 Sol borra archivos y datos sin advertencia. OpenAI había divulgado parcialmente el problema en junio, generando preocupaciones sobre confiabilidad en producción.
bajada_en: Multiple users report GPT-5.6 Sol deletes files and data without warning. OpenAI had partially disclosed the issue in June, raising reliability concerns for production use.

title: SpaceXAI’s Grok programming tool was uploading its users’ entire codebase to cloud storage
summary: SpaceXAI's Grok Build AI coding tool was spotted uploading users' entire codebases to Google Cloud before it was reported, and the company turned it off. The Register reports that Cereblab published findings on Monday showing how the Grok Build CLI was packaging and uploading entire code repositories, "including files it was told not to open […]
title_es: Grok Build de SpaceXAI subía bases de código completas sin consentimiento
bajada: La herramienta de codificación Grok Build fue descubierta cargando repositorios completos a Google Cloud sin autorización. SpaceXAI desactivó la funcionalidad tras ser reportado el problema de seguridad crítico.
bajada_en: The Grok Build coding tool was discovered uploading entire repositories to Google Cloud without authorization. SpaceXAI disabled the functionality after the critical security issue was reported.

title: Meta accused of using biased AI targeting for mass layoffs
summary: A group of 26 former Meta employees is suing the company over claims that it used AI tools to unfairly target workers on leave with layoffs, as reported earlier by Reuters. In the lawsuit, the employees allege Meta determined which workers to dismiss based on performance data collected by a "constellation" of internal AI tools, […]
title_es: Meta demandada por usar IA sesgada para despidos masivos
bajada: 26 exempleados de Meta demandan a la empresa por usar herramientas IA con sesgo para dirigirse a trabajadores en licencia durante despidos. El caso cuestiona la equidad de algoritmos usados en decisiones de recursos humanos críticas.
bajada_en: 26 former Meta employees are suing the company for using biased AI tools to target workers on leave during layoffs. The case challenges the fairness of algorithms used in critical HR decisions.

title: Nemotron Labs: How Open Models Give Enterprises and Nations AI They Can Trust, Control and Customize
summary: Enterprises have plenty of powerful models to choose from. The real test is whether the AI an enterprise builds uniquely addresses the needs of the business: improving workflows, tapping into domain knowledge and exceeding standards for accuracy and trust.
title_es: NVIDIA presenta Nemotron Labs para modelos IA personalizables
bajada: NVIDIA lanzó Nemotron Labs, enfocado en modelos abiertos que permiten a empresas controlar, personalizar y confiar en sus sistemas de IA. El enfoque responde a la necesidad de soluciones que se adapten a casos de uso específicos y cumplan estándares de precisión.
bajada_en: NVIDIA launched Nemotron Labs, focused on open models that allow enterprises to control, customize, and trust their AI systems. The approach addresses the need for solutions tailored to specific use cases and meeting accuracy standards.

title: OpenAI may announce a ChatGPT smart speaker this year
summary: OpenAI's first device is set to be a smart speaker that lets you talk with ChatGPT, according to a report from Bloomberg. The device apparently won't have a screen, but will use a camera and additional sensors to "understand" your environment. The report comes just days after Apple filed a lawsuit against OpenAI that accused […]
title_es: OpenAI planea anunciar ChatGPT speaker este año
bajada: Bloomberg reporta que OpenAI desarrolla un speaker inteligente para conversar con ChatGPT, equipado con cámara y sensores pero sin pantalla. Es similar al reporte anterior pero con más detalles sobre las capacidades del dispositivo.
bajada_en: Bloomberg reports OpenAI is developing an intelligent speaker for conversing with ChatGPT, equipped with camera and sensors but without a screen. Similar to the previous report but with more device capability details.

title: Apple opens its new Siri AI to everyone with the iOS 27 public beta
summary: If you’ve been waiting to try Apple’s revamped Siri without installing a developer beta, you now can. The company on Tuesday released the iOS 27 public beta, giving iPhone owners early access to its AI-powered assistant and other new features before the software’s official launch this fall.
title_es: Apple abre Siri IA a todos con beta pública de iOS 27
bajada: Apple lanzó la beta pública de iOS 27, permitiendo a propietarios de iPhone acceder temprano a la Siri rediseñada con capacidades IA. La disponibilidad pública antes del lanzamiento oficial permite mayor feedback de usuarios.
bajada_en: Apple released iOS 27 public beta, allowing iPhone owners early access to redesigned Siri with AI capabilities. Public availability before official launch enables broader user feedback.

title: Jul 14, 2026ProductIntroducing Claude for Teachers
summary: Product Introducing Claude for Teachers Jul 14, 2026 We're introducing Claude for Teachers , providing verified K-12 educators in the US free access to premium Claude capabilities, a library of teaching skills, and a direct connection to evidence-based curricula, mapped to academic standards in all 50 states. Why we’re building for teachers Decades of research show that practices like differentiation, mastery-based learning, and small group instruction reliably improve student achievement, but teachers are often short on time and resources to implement them. Budgets are stretched, classes may be too large to meet every student's individual needs, and planning often spills into evenings. This strain is heaviest in under-resourced schools. Claude for Teachers is designed to close the gap between educational best practices and what a teacher's week allows. Early evidence suggests that while the impact of AI tools for students is mixed and depends on the implementation, AI tools for teachers can strengthen instructional practice and improve student outcomes. This is the aim of Claude for Teachers: support the craft behind great teaching and protect what teachers value most—time with their students. Connected to evidence-based curricula and the K-12 ecosystem Claude for Teachers connects to Learning Commons , giving Claude access to academic standards across all 50 states—and beneath each standard, the smaller learning competencies it's built from and the order students typically learn them. So when Claude drafts a lesson plan, it’s scaffolded and aligned to teaching standards. Claude for Teachers also brings in trusted curricular resources like OpenSciEd and IM v.360 from Illustrative Mathematics . As of today, educators can now connect Claude across an entire ecosystem of K-12 tools. ASSISTments : Generate auto-scored, standards-aligned math problems for practice and assessment. Brisk Teaching : Create interactive student activities and standards-aligned lessons, turni
title_es: Anthropic lanza Claude for Teachers con acceso gratuito
bajada: Anthropic presentó Claude for Teachers, ofreciendo acceso gratuito a docentes verificados de K-12 en EE.UU. con herramientas de enseñanza y currículum vinculado a estándares estatales. La iniciativa busca mejorar prácticas educativas mediante IA.
bajada_en: Anthropic launched Claude for Teachers, offering free access to verified K-12 educators in the US with teaching tools and curriculum linked to state standards. The initiative aims to improve educational practices through AI.

title: New LLM Coordination Benchmark - Benchmarking Open-Ended Multi-Agent Coordination in Language Agents [R]
summary: Can LLM agents coordinate in long-horizon, open-ended worlds?We evaluate 13 modern LLMs in a new benchmark where agents must work together to explore, communicate, trade resources, craft tools, build structures, and fight mobs.TL;DR: Most agents struggle, averaging only ~6% normalised return. Yet on the hardest setting, zero-shot Gemini 3.1 Pro performs comparably to the best MARL agent trained for 1 billion environment steps.More broadly, we findcoordination is a distinct bottleneckbeyond long-horizon task competence, with communication having the largest effect in our harness ablations.Paper:https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.08340Project page and leaderboard:https://alem-world.github.ioCode:https://github.com/alem-world/alem-envInteractive traces:https://alem-world.github.io/traces.htmlFeel free to ask any questions!submitted by/u/ktessera[link][comments]
title_es: Nuevo benchmark mide coordinación de agentes en LLMs
bajada: Investigadores presentaron un benchmark que evalúa la coordinación entre 13 LLMs modernos en mundos abiertos de largo horizonte. Los resultados muestran que la coordinación es un cuello de botella distinto, con Gemini 3.1 Pro liderando en configuraciones sin entrenamiento.
bajada_en: Researchers presented a benchmark evaluating coordination among 13 modern LLMs in long-horizon open-ended worlds. Results show coordination is a distinct bottleneck, with Gemini 3.1 Pro leading in zero-shot configurations.

title: How to manage AI investments in the agentic era
summary: Learn how enterprises can manage AI investments in the agentic era by measuring useful work per dollar, improving efficiency, and scaling high-value workflows.
title_es: OpenAI publica guía para invertir en IA en la era de agentes
bajada: OpenAI compartió recomendaciones para que empresas administren inversiones en IA midiendo trabajo útil por dólar y escalando workflows de alto valor. La guía refleja el cambio hacia sistemas agenticos más complejos.
bajada_en: OpenAI shared recommendations for enterprises to manage AI investments by measuring useful work per dollar and scaling high-value workflows. The guide reflects the shift toward more complex agentic systems.

title: Spotify is now an AI chatbot, too
summary: Spotify is experimenting with a new AI feature that allows Premium subscribers to play and explore music, audiobooks, and podcasts by having conversations with a chatbot. The "Talk to Spotify" feature appears across the Home and Now Playing view on Spotify's mobile app. You can interact with the chatbot by typing your request in the […]
title_es: Spotify experimenta con chatbot IA para explorar contenido
bajada: Spotify prueba "Talk to Spotify", una característica que permite a usuarios Premium explorar música, audiolibros y podcasts mediante conversación con un chatbot. La funcionalidad mejora la experiencia de búsqueda y descubrimiento.
bajada_en: Spotify is testing "Talk to Spotify", allowing Premium users to explore music, audiobooks, and podcasts through chatbot conversation. The feature improves search and discovery experience.

title: Why Performance per Watt Is the Ultimate Metric for AI Infrastructure Efficiency
summary: Power is AI infrastructure’s inescapable constraint. How many tokens an AI factory can generate within a fixed power budget determines its revenue and profitability. Because of this, performance per watt — a metric that can’t be gamed, only earned through real-world results — is the foundation for AI factories.  As agentic AI drives token demand […]
title_es: NVIDIA destaca rendimiento por vatio como métrica clave de IA
bajada: NVIDIA argumenta que el rendimiento por vatio es la métrica fundamental para eficiencia en infraestructura IA, determinando capacidad de generación de tokens y rentabilidad. Con la demanda de IA agéntica, la eficiencia energética se vuelve crítica.
bajada_en: NVIDIA argues that performance per watt is the fundamental metric for AI infrastructure efficiency, determining token generation capacity and profitability. With agentic AI demand, energy efficiency becomes critical.

title: The Google Images homepage will recommend photos even before you search
summary: Google is announcing a big change to the Google Images homepage in honor of the platform's 25th anniversary this week. Instead of a mostly blank page with a search bar, the homepage will soon show you a bunch of images that it thinks you might like before you even start searching. The company says the […]
title_es: Google Images ahora recomienda fotos sin búsqueda previa
bajada: Google actualiza la página principal de Google Images para mostrar recomendaciones antes de que el usuario busque. La innovación usa IA para anticipar preferencias y mejorar el descubrimiento de contenido visual.
bajada_en: Google updates Google Images homepage to show recommendations before users search. The innovation uses AI to anticipate preferences and improve visual content discovery.

title: OpenAI pushes back on Apple trade secret lawsuit
summary: OpenAI has issued another statement on the lawsuit, this time suggesting it lacks merit.
title_es: OpenAI cuestiona demanda de Apple por secretos comerciales
bajada: OpenAI emitió un comunicado rechazando la demanda de Apple por presunta violación de secretos comerciales. La disputa legal continúa calentándose entre dos gigantes tecnológicos sobre propiedad intelectual.
bajada_en: OpenAI issued a statement challenging Apple's trade secret lawsuit as lacking merit. The legal dispute continues between two tech giants over intellectual property.

title: Celebrating 25 years of visual search innovation
summary: Google Images logo surrounded by illustrations of people searching for different images
title_es: Google celebra 25 años de innovación en búsqueda visual
bajada: Google marca el 25 aniversario de Google Images, la plataforma pionera de búsqueda visual. El hito subraya la evolución de las capacidades de búsqueda basadas en imagen en la última década.
bajada_en: Google marks the 25th anniversary of Google Images, the pioneering visual search platform. The milestone underscores the evolution of image-based search capabilities over the past decade.
